title: The View is in BIG Trouble with the FCC - CBS Accused of Hoax!
description:
The View is in BIG Trouble with the FCC - CBS Accused of Hoax! Brendan Carr laughs at CBS Stephen Colbert and ABC The View trying to circumvent the rules. The View under FCC investigation for equal time rule violation (featuring Democratic Senate candidate James Telerico without rivals Jasmine Crockett/Republican), Brendan Carr confirms enforcement action, calls Stephen Colbert/Telerico incident "hoax," media trust low ("gas station sushi" quote)—talk shows like The View/Colbert/Kimmel no longer exempt when featuring candidates. We break down recent reports on enforcement, hoax fundraising $2.5M, and why people don't trust national news media.
